TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: lasu u hulanteya a ssitungusay a tademaw, u sitangahay, mucuduhay tu nu mukasi a cuda, palamlamn nida ku nipitadas amisulit, Lasu u matingnay tu datu wawahenay matineng atu u satawaan cinida a tademaw, sitangah, wawahenay idaw t uku nisulitan nida tu dadiw, sapidatuk, sapilihay a cuda. Yadah ku nisulit nida tu nu milihayay, niyadu'ay, sapisalukiw, a dadiw atu datuk, masasuala tu tawyaay a nikaudip a dadiw. matineng cinida pakayni i nikaudip ahican misangatu datuk, pakanin nida I suni nikaudip, ussuni idaw ku masalainay pasasuala han nida, kiya malacacay a didaw attu datuk kanamuhan nu katuuday. Udadiw nida tu nu Hulanse,Yitali nu niyaduay a dadiw, nu Duwic a nukakitaan a sapisalukiyaw a dadiw datuk masaniyadu'. 1594amihca 6 ayabulad 14 ademiad mapatay i Munihi, yu adiwawa henay i mungsecinnikula a kiwkay malamudadiway nu masakaputay, ya takulaw nu ngiha nida sakaasuan sa atengilan , nipahengadan tu nu masakaputay kinatulu, 1594ŚĻī6śúą14 3ś¨°. 12 kumihcaan nida tayda i yitali, sayaway sa i ssisili, milan, napulese tidamaudip, 1553 amihcaan i lumasenyihan, latelam a kiwkay malamutuduay mudadiw. 1555ÔĹě1556amihcaan tayda cinida i antewipu, patahekal tu sayaway nida nalimaan a datuk. 1555ÔĹě1556 . i hilanse ni sang-sung ni duwic i lite, . nalimaan ni lasu sakanawlan masaniyadu' kalamkam katinengan tu kasakaydih an nu katuuday. Sakasenengan nida u "pakuyucay kaku a tademaw"ungiha nu tademaw datuk dadiw pasasuala han nida. matatengteng ku datuk tu dadiw mihida ku nisangaan ni lassu sakanawlan sa. yadadiw nida tu sulit sa mahida nikaudip nu maudipay sakanawlan a wayway, "pakuyucay kaku a tademaw" labu nu sulit a dadiw hinisa kiya sulit"pakuyucay kaku a tademaw". " .
S.PHON: r~…ĺasu u ńßur~…ĺant…ôa a ssituŇčusaj a tad…ômaw, u sitaŇčańßaj, mu ¶uduńßaj tu nu mukasi a ¶uda, par~…ĺamr~…ĺamn nida ku nipitadas amisur~…ĺit, r~…ĺasu u matiŇčnaj tu datu wawańß…ônaj matin…ôŇč atu u satawaan ¶inida a tad…ômaw, sitaŇčańß, wawańß…ônaj idaw t uku nisur~…ĺitan nida tu dadiw, sapidatuk, sapir~…ĺińßaj a ¶uda. jadańß ku nisur~…ĺit nida tu nu mir~…ĺińßajaj, nijadu Ē~ °aj, sapisar~…ĺukiw, a dadiw atu datuk, masasuar~…ĺa tu tawjaaj a nikaudip a dadiw. matin…ôŇč ¶inida pakajni i nikaudip ańßi ¶an misaŇčatu datuk, pakanin nida i suni nikaudip, ussuni idaw ku masar~…ĺainaj pasasuar~…ĺa ńßan nida, kija mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a didaw attu datuk kanamuńßan nu katuudaj. udadiw nida tu nu ńßur~…ĺans…ô,jitar~…ĺi nu nijaduaj a dadiw, nu duwi ¶ a nukakitaan a sapisar~…ĺukijaw a dadiw datuk masanijadu Ē~ °. ****amińß ¶a * ajabur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad mapataj i munińßi, ju adiwawa ńß…ônaj i muŇčs…ô ¶innikur~…ĺa a kiwkaj mar~…ĺamudadiwaj nu masakaputaj, ja takur~…ĺaw nu Ňčińßa nida sakaasuan sa at…ôŇčir~…ĺan , nipańß…ôŇčadan tu nu masakaputaj kinatur~…ĺu, ********* **. ** kumińß ¶aan nida tajda i jitar~…ĺi, sajawaj sa i ssisir~…ĺi, mir~…ĺan, napur~…ĺ…ôs…ô tidamaudip, **** amińß ¶aan i r~…ĺumas…ônjińßan, r~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺam a kiwkaj mar~…ĺamutuduaj mudadiw. *********amińß ¶aan tajda ¶inida i ant…ôwipu, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sajawaj nida nar~…ĺimaan a datuk. ********* . i ńßir~…ĺans…ô ni saŇč-suŇč ni duwi ¶ i r~…ĺit…ô, . nar~…ĺimaan ni r~…ĺasu sakanawr~…ĺan masanijadu Ē~ ° kar~…ĺamkam katin…ôŇčan tu kasakajdińß an nu katuudaj. sakas…ôn…ôŇčan nida u "pakuju ¶aj kaku a tad…ômaw"uŇčińßa nu tad…ômaw datuk dadiw pasasuar~…ĺa ńßan nida. matat…ôŇčt…ôŇč ku datuk tu dadiw mińßida ku nisaŇčaan ni r~…ĺassu sakanawr~…ĺan sa. jadadiw nida tu sur~…ĺit sa mańßida nikaudip nu maudipaj sakanawr~…ĺan a wajwaj, "pakuju ¶aj kaku a tad…ômaw" r~…ĺabu nu sur~…ĺit a dadiw ńßinisa kija sur~…ĺit"pakuju ¶aj kaku a tad…ômaw". " .
S.FORM: lasu u hulanteya a ssitungusay a tademaw, u sitangahay, mucuduhay tu nu mukasi a cuda, palamlamn nida ku nipitadas amisulit, Lasu u matingnay tu datu wawahenay matineng atu u satawaan cinida a tademaw, sitangah, wawahenay idaw t uku nisulitan nida tu dadiw, sapidatuk, sapilihay a cuda. Yadah ku nisulit nida tu nu milihayay, niyadu'ay, sapisalukiw, a dadiw atu datuk, masasuala tu tawyaay a nikaudip a dadiw. matineng cinida pakayni i nikaudip ahican misangatu datuk, pakanin nida I suni nikaudip, ussuni idaw ku masalainay pasasuala han nida, kiya malacacay a didaw attu datuk kanamuhan nu katuuday. Udadiw nida tu nu Hulanse,Yitali nu niyaduay a dadiw, nu Duwic a nukakitaan a sapisalukiyaw a dadiw datuk masaniyadu'. 1594amihca 6 ayabulad 14 ademiad mapatay i Munihi, yu adiwawa henay i mungsecinnikula a kiwkay malamudadiway nu masakaputay, ya takulaw nu ngiha nida sakaasuan sa atengilan , nipahengadan tu nu masakaputay kinatulu, 1594ŚĻī6śúą14 3ś¨°. 12 kumihcaan nida tayda i yitali, sayaway sa i ssisili, milan, napulese tidamaudip, 1553 amihcaan i lumasenyihan, latelam a kiwkay malamutuduay mudadiw. 1555ÔĹě1556amihcaan tayda cinida i antewipu, patahekal tu sayaway nida nalimaan a datuk. 1555ÔĹě1556 . i hilanse ni sang-sung ni duwic i lite, . nalimaan ni lasu sakanawlan masaniyadu' kalamkam katinengan tu kasakaydih an nu katuuday. Sakasenengan nida u "pakuyucay kaku a tademaw"ungiha nu tademaw datuk dadiw pasasuala han nida. matatengteng ku datuk tu dadiw mihida ku nisangaan ni lassu sakanawlan sa. yadadiw nida tu sulit sa mahida nikaudip nu maudipay sakanawlan a wayway, "pakuyucay kaku a tademaw" labu nu sulit a dadiw hinisa kiya sulit"pakuyucay kaku a tademaw". " .
S.PHON: r~…ĺasu u ńßur~…ĺant…ôa a ssituŇčusaj a tad…ômaw, u sitaŇčańßaj, mu ¶uduńßaj tu nu mukasi a ¶uda, par~…ĺamr~…ĺamn nida ku nipitadas amisur~…ĺit, r~…ĺasu u matiŇčnaj tu datu wawańß…ônaj matin…ôŇč atu u satawaan ¶inida a tad…ômaw, sitaŇčańß, wawańß…ônaj idaw t uku nisur~…ĺitan nida tu dadiw, sapidatuk, sapir~…ĺińßaj a ¶uda. jadańß ku nisur~…ĺit nida tu nu mir~…ĺińßajaj, nijadu Ē~ °aj, sapisar~…ĺukiw, a dadiw atu datuk, masasuar~…ĺa tu tawjaaj a nikaudip a dadiw. matin…ôŇč ¶inida pakajni i nikaudip ańßi ¶an misaŇčatu datuk, pakanin nida i suni nikaudip, ussuni idaw ku masar~…ĺainaj pasasuar~…ĺa ńßan nida, kija mar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a didaw attu datuk kanamuńßan nu katuudaj. udadiw nida tu nu ńßur~…ĺans…ô,jitar~…ĺi nu nijaduaj a dadiw, nu duwi ¶ a nukakitaan a sapisar~…ĺukijaw a dadiw datuk masanijadu Ē~ °. ****amińß ¶a * ajabur~…ĺad ** ad…ômiad mapataj i munińßi, ju adiwawa ńß…ônaj i muŇčs…ô ¶innikur~…ĺa a kiwkaj mar~…ĺamudadiwaj nu masakaputaj, ja takur~…ĺaw nu Ňčińßa nida sakaasuan sa at…ôŇčir~…ĺan , nipańß…ôŇčadan tu nu masakaputaj kinatur~…ĺu, ********* **. ** kumińß ¶aan nida tajda i jitar~…ĺi, sajawaj sa i ssisir~…ĺi, mir~…ĺan, napur~…ĺ…ôs…ô tidamaudip, **** amińß ¶aan i r~…ĺumas…ônjińßan, r~…ĺat…ôr~…ĺam a kiwkaj mar~…ĺamutuduaj mudadiw. *********amińß ¶aan tajda ¶inida i ant…ôwipu, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sajawaj nida nar~…ĺimaan a datuk. ********* . i ńßir~…ĺans…ô ni saŇč-suŇč ni duwi ¶ i r~…ĺit…ô, . nar~…ĺimaan ni r~…ĺasu sakanawr~…ĺan masanijadu Ē~ ° kar~…ĺamkam katin…ôŇčan tu kasakajdińß an nu katuudaj. sakas…ôn…ôŇčan nida u "pakuju ¶aj kaku a tad…ômaw"uŇčińßa nu tad…ômaw datuk dadiw pasasuar~…ĺa ńßan nida. matat…ôŇčt…ôŇč ku datuk tu dadiw mińßida ku nisaŇčaan ni r~…ĺassu sakanawr~…ĺan sa. jadadiw nida tu sur~…ĺit sa mańßida nikaudip nu maudipaj sakanawr~…ĺan a wajwaj, "pakuju ¶aj kaku a tad…ômaw" r~…ĺabu nu sur~…ĺit a dadiw ńßinisa kija sur~…ĺit"pakuju ¶aj kaku a tad…ômaw". " .
